items.title: Kenley Jansen pakt derde plek op lijst All Time Saves

items.title: Tennisæfingar felld niður til 13.apríl / Tennis practices cancelled until April 13
items.summary_ja: アイスランドのテニス練習が4月13日まで中止となった。野球関連の内容ではない
items.summary_en: Tennis practices have been cancelled until April 13. This announcement is from the Icelandic federation and relates to tennis, not baseball. No baseball-related content or implications are mentioned in this administrative notice.
items.title_ja: アイスランド、テニス練習を4月13日まで中止
items.title_en: Tennis practices cancelled until April 13

items.title: Tennisæfingar frestað til mánudaginn, 23.mars / Tennis practices postponed until Monday, March 23
items.summary_ja: アイスランドのテニス練習が3月23日月曜日まで延期された。ÍSÍと保健当局の協議により、幼稚園・小学校での活動準備が間に合わず、スポーツ活動にも影響が出ている。
items.summary_en: Iceland's tennis practices have been postponed until Monday, March 23. Following discussions between ÍSÍ and public health authorities, preparations for children's participation in sports activities could not be completed in time, causing disruption to sports programming in the coming days.
items.title_ja: アイスランド・テニス練習延期

items.title: Frábært þátttöku HMR krökkum á 1.Stórmót TSÍ
items.summary_ja: Kópavogurのテニス会場で開催された第1回TSÍ大会にHMRから13名が参加。Riya Nitinkumar KalugadeとBryndís Roxana Solomonがそれぞれのクラスで優勝した。
items.summary_en: HMR had strong participation at the 1st TSÍ Tennis Federation Major Tournament in Kópavogur, with thirteen competitors including eleven kids across Mini Tennis, U10, U14 and ITN categories. Riya Nitinkumar Kalugade (U10) and Bryndís Roxana Solomon (Mini Tennis) won their respective categories.
items.title_ja: HMRキッズがTSÍ大会で活躍
items.title_en: Great participation of HMR kids at 1st TSÍ Major Tournament

items.title: RESPECT Campaign
items.summary_ja: 英国野球連盟が26シーズン開幕にあたりRESPECTキャンペーンを呼びかけた。オフシーズンに310名のLevel 6審判が新たに資格を取得し、国内の有資格審判は518名となった。
items.summary_en: The British Baseball Federation reminded players, coaches, and spectators about the RESPECT Campaign ahead of the 2026 season's opening weekends. During the offseason, 310 newly qualified Level 6 umpires completed courses nationwide, bringing Britain's total number of qualified umpires to 518.
items.title_ja: BBF、RESPECTキャンペーンを呼びかけ
items.title_en: RESPECT Campaign

items.title: The WBSC announces 2026/27 Women’s Baseball World Cup Groups and hosts
items.summary_ja: WBSCが2026/27女子野球ワールドカップのホスト国とグループ分けを発表。昨夏Czechia大会で世界15位となった英国の組合せも確定した。
items.summary_en: The WBSC confirmed the hosts and group allocations for the 2026/27 Women's Baseball World Cup. Following their success in Czechia last summer where they ranked 15th in the world, Great Britain now knows its group opponents and the challenge ahead in the upcoming tournament.
items.title_ja: 女子W杯、英国の組分け発表
items.title_en: The WBSC announces 2026/27 Women's Baseball World Cup Groups and hosts

items.title: Great Britain Women’s Baseball Team Inspires Future Talent at Cardiff Event
items.summary_ja: 3月21日、英国女子代表がCardiffで4時間の合同トレーニング兼タレント発掘イベントを開催。シニア代表、WNT Development Squad、若手候補が集結した。
items.summary_en: On March 21, the Great Britain Women's National Baseball Team hosted a four-hour training and talent identification event in Cardiff. The session brought together senior team members, the Women's National Team Development Squad, and a group of aspiring young players hoping to earn future national team selection.
items.title_ja: 英女子代表、Cardiffで発掘イベント
items.title_en: Great Britain Women's Baseball Team Inspires Future Talent at Cardiff Event

items.title: Davide Montanari: “Serie A Gold? Nessuna pressione per me e la Farma Crocetta”
items.summary_ja: 2004年生まれの右腕Davide MontanariがFarma CrocettaでSerie A Goldデビュー、Unipol Bologna戦で好投した。U23代表入りも目標に掲げる。
items.summary_en: Right-hander Davide Montanari, born in 2004, made a convincing Serie A Gold debut as Farma Crocetta's game 2 starter against Unipol Bologna. Beyond the Italian top-league campaign, Montanari has set his sights on earning a spot with the Italy Baseball Under 23 national team this season.
items.title_ja: Montanari、Serie A Goldデビューで好投
items.title_en: Davide Montanari: 'Serie A Gold? No pressure for me and Farma Crocetta'

items.title: CNA: liste arbitrali e gestione timer
items.summary_ja: イタリア野球ソフトボール連盟のCNAが2026年シーズンの審判ランクリストを公表。Umpire Conventionで示された試合タイマーの運用方法も改めて周知された。
items.summary_en: Italy's National Umpire Committee (CNA) published the 2026 season ranking lists for baseball and softball umpires, available in the documents section. The committee also reiterated the timer management procedures for baseball games that were presented during the Umpire Convention.
items.title_ja: CNA、2026年審判リストとタイマー運用を発表
items.title_en: CNA: umpire lists and timer management

items.title: Italia Baseball U23, vince il maltempo: annullato il raduno di oggi a Bologna
items.summary_ja: 悪天候によりBolognaで予定されていたItalia Baseball U23の合宿と、Unipol Fortitudoとの親善試合が延期された。Gianni Falchi球場のグラウンドは冠水した。
items.summary_en: Due to severe bad weather hitting Bologna, the Italy Baseball Under 23 national team's training camp at Gianni Falchi Stadium and the evening friendly against Unipol Fortitudo have been postponed. The stadium's playing field was flooded, making any activity impossible for the day.
items.title_ja: Italia U23、悪天候でBologna合宿中止
items.title_en: Italy Baseball U23: bad weather wins, today's Bologna training cancelled

items.title: Gejagte Jägerinnen: Metrostars wollen Titelverteidigung
items.summary_ja: Vienna Metrostarsが2026シーズン開幕。2023年王座、2024年決勝、2025年Chicklets戦第3戦での劇的優勝に続き、連覇を目指す追われる立場でスタートする。
items.summary_en: Defending champion Vienna Metrostars begin the 2026 softball season with a target on their backs. The Viennese have become Austria's dominant force with the 2023 title, 2024 final appearance, and a dramatic 2025 game-three triumph over the favored Chicklets, and now face the challenge of defending.
items.title_ja: Metrostars、ソフト連覇を狙う
items.title_en: Hunted hunters: Metrostars aim for title defense

items.title: Mission "Titel Nummer zwei"
items.summary_ja: Crazy Chicklets Wr. Neustadtが昨季決勝第3戦の敗北を糧に、2026ソフトボール王座奪還を目指す。冬の間に補強を進め、Yuna Mauersichがレンタルで加入した。
items.summary_en: Crazy Chicklets Wr. Neustadt aim for their second Austrian softball title in 2026 after falling just one game short of defending the championship last season against Vienna Metrostars. The roster has been reinforced over the winter, including loan player Yuna Mauersich joining the squad.
items.title_ja: Chicklets、2度目の王座に挑戦
items.title_en: Mission 'Title Number Two'

items.title: V-Cup im Gepäck, Titel im Visier – Indians wollen den nächsten Schritt
items.summary_ja: Dornbirn IndiansがV-Cup決勝でFeldkirch Cardinalsを11-0で下し2026シーズンに弾み。開幕はHard Bullsとのダービー2連戦で真価が問われる。
items.summary_en: The Dornbirn Indians enter the 2026 Austrian baseball season with high confidence after a dominant V-Cup triumph, capped by an 11-0 final win over the Feldkirch Cardinals. Their opening test comes immediately with two derby games against the Hard Bulls on Sunday, marking the first real benchmark.
items.title_ja: Indians、V-Cup制覇で自信の開幕
items.title_en: V-Cup in the bag, title in sight – Indians want the next step

items.title: WBSC Europe organiza su primera Convención Baseball5 en Sofía para impulsar el desarrollo en toda Europa.
items.summary_ja: WBSC Europeが3月27-29日にBulgaria・Sofiaで初のBaseball5会議を開催。11カ国から25名が集まり、欧州におけるBaseball5の今後の発展を議論した。
items.summary_en: WBSC Europe successfully held its first Baseball5 Convention from March 27-29, 2026 in Sofia, Bulgaria, bringing together representatives from across Europe to discuss future development of the discipline. The event gathered 25 participants from 11 countries to share strategies and plans for expanding Baseball5.
items.title_ja: WBSC Europe、Sofiaで初のBaseball5会議
items.title_en: WBSC Europe holds first Baseball5 Convention in Sofia to boost development across Europe

items.title: Publicado el calendario del Campeonato Europeo para la Copa Mundial de Softbol Femenino Sub-15 WBSC
items.summary_ja: WBSC EuropeがオランダRosmalenで7月27日-8月1日に開催するU-15女子ソフトボール欧州選手権の日程を発表。2026年U-22女子ソフト欧州選手権の形式も確定した。
items.summary_en: WBSC Europe has announced the schedule for the 2026 U-15 Women's European Softball Championship, to be held in Rosmalen, Netherlands, from July 27 to August 1. The format and calendar for the 2026 U-22 Women's European Softball Championship has also been confirmed by the organization.
items.title_ja: 欧州U-15女子ソフトボール日程発表
items.title_en: European Championship schedule published for WBSC U-15 Women's Softball World Cup

items.title: Madrid acoge el Campeonato de España de Baseball5 Sub-18 por Selecciones Autonómicas
items.summary_ja: RFEBSがMadridのFederación Madrileñaと共催で、4月18日にPolideportivo de La Elipaで自治州対抗U18 Baseball5スペイン選手権を開催。有望若手選手が集結する。
items.summary_en: The RFEBS, in collaboration with the Madrid Baseball and Softball Federation, will host the 2026 Spanish U-18 Baseball5 Championship for Regional Teams on April 18 at the Polideportivo de La Elipa in Madrid. The event will bring together some of the country's top national prospects in this discipline.
items.title_ja: MadridでU18 Baseball5スペイン選手権
items.title_en: Madrid hosts Spanish U-18 Baseball5 Championship for Regional Teams

items.title: Besplatan Baseball Kamp
items.summary_ja: Hrvatski Baseball Savezが7月28日から8月1日にZagreb・Jarun球場で無料の子ども野球キャンプを開催。University of Northern ColoradoのコーチNick ChiseriとConnor Kehlが指導する。
items.summary_en: The Croatian Baseball Federation is hosting a free open baseball camp for children at Jarun Baseball Field from July 28 to August 1, 2025, with daily training from 17:30 to 19:30. Coaches Nick Chiseri and Connor Kehl from the University of Northern Colorado will organize and lead all the training sessions.
items.title_ja: Jarunで無料子ども野球キャンプ
items.title_en: Free Baseball Camp

items.title: Konačna rang lista učenika za šolsku godinu 2025/2026
items.summary_ja: Hrvatski Baseball Savezが2025/2026学年度の高校入学時にスポーツ科を選んだ学生の最終ランキングを発表した。
items.summary_en: The Croatian Baseball Federation published the final ranking list of students who selected the athletes' department when enrolling in secondary school for the 2025/2026 academic year. This ranking determines placement for student-athletes in specialized sports-track programs within Croatian high schools.
items.title_ja: クロアチア、学生最終ランキング発表
items.title_en: Final student ranking list for school year 2025/2026

items.title: Preliminarna rang lista učenika za šolsku godinu 2025/2026
items.summary_ja: Hrvatski Baseball Savezが2025/2026学年度の高校入学時にスポーツ科を選んだ学生の暫定ランキングを発表。異議申立期間は6月16-18日。
items.summary_en: The Croatian Baseball Federation published the preliminary ranking list of students who selected the athletes' department when enrolling in secondary school for the 2025/2026 academic year. The appeal period runs from Monday, June 16 to Wednesday, June 18, with objections accepted via email only.
items.title_ja: クロアチア、学生ランキング暫定版
items.title_en: Preliminary student ranking list for school year 2025/2026

items.title: Nova pobeda Beograda 96 u Prvenstvu Srbije
items.summary_ja: セルビア選手権シニア第2節でBeograd 96がVojvodeを22-4の5回コールドで下し2連勝。Vojvodeは投手が四球を連発し、4回の9得点で大差がついた。
items.summary_en: In round two of the Serbian Senior Championship, Beograd 96 defeated Vojvode 22-4 in five innings. Beograd started strongly in a game full of walks from Vojvode pitchers, with the lead growing each inning and a decisive 9-run fourth inning sealing matters. Beograd now stands 2-0 on the season.
items.title_ja: Beograd 96、セルビア選手権で連勝
items.title_en: New win for Beograd 96 in Serbian Championship

items.title: Pobede Beograda i Novog Sada u prvom kolu
items.summary_ja: セルビア選手権シニア開幕節でBeograd 96が新参Dragoonsを32-1で、Novi SadがKragujevacを40-6で圧倒。上位3チームと若手チームの力差が顕著となった。
items.summary_en: In round one of the Serbian Senior Championship, Beograd 96 crushed newcomers Dragoons 32-1 in five innings at Ada Ciganlija, while Novi Sad dominated Kragujevac 40-6 in the afternoon match. The opening weekend showed a substantial class gap between the top three teams and the young Kragujevac side plus newcomers Dragoons.
items.title_ja: セルビア開幕、BeogradとNovi Sadが白星
items.title_en: Wins for Beograd and Novi Sad in the first round

items.title: Počinje nova bejzbol sezona!
items.summary_ja: 2026年セルビア選手権が次週末開幕。Beograd 96、Vojvode/Vojvodina、Kragujevac、Novi Sad、新加入のDragoons Beogradの5チームが参加、2巡戦で争われる。
items.summary_en: The 2026 Serbian Baseball Championship begins next weekend with five teams participating: Beograd 96, Vojvode/Vojvodina, Kragujevac, Novi Sad, and new member Dragoons Beograd. Vojvode and Vojvodina will field a joint team under the Vojvode name. A double round-robin format will be played on fields in Belgrade and Kragujevac.
items.title_ja: セルビア野球2026シーズン開幕へ
items.title_en: New baseball season begins!

items.title: Cernica găzduiește primul turneu al Campionatului Național de Baseball5 pentru U12 și U15
items.summary_ja: 2026年3月15日、Sala Sporturilor BălăceancaでBaseball5全国選手権U12・U15カテゴリーの第1戦が開催される。ルーマニア各地の育成センターから有力チームが集結し、都市型野球の新シーズン幕開けを飾る
items.summary_en: Romania's National Baseball5 Championship for U12 and U15 categories opens its season on March 15, 2026 at Sala Sporturilor Bălăceanca in Cernica. The event brings together some of the country's most active development centers, promising dynamic matches and fair-play action as the competitive season begins.
items.title_ja: Baseball5全国選手権U12・U15第1戦、Cernicaで開催
items.title_en: Cernica hosts first tournament of National Baseball5 Championship for U12 and U15

items.title: Convocator Adunare Generală Ordinară și de Alegeri a FRBS 2026
items.summary_ja: FRBSは2026年4月16日、ブカレストのArcul de Triumf国立スポーツ複合施設で通常総会および役員選挙を開催。2026年2月23日の執行委員会決定に基づき、加盟団体に招集通知を発送した
items.summary_en: The Romanian Baseball and Softball Federation (FRBS) has called its 2026 Ordinary and Elective General Assembly for April 16, 2026 at the Arcul de Triumf National Sports Complex in Bucharest. The Executive Committee decided on the convocation at its February 23, 2026 meeting, notifying affiliated voting sports structures.
items.title_ja: ルーマニア野球・ソフトボール連盟、2026年通常総会を4月開催
items.title_en: Convocation of FRBS 2026 Ordinary and Elective General Assembly

items.title: Campionatul Național de Baseball5 – Seniori & U18 – Turneul 1 – 2026
items.summary_ja: 2026年3月7日、Roman市のSala SporturilorでBaseball5全国選手権シニア・U18カテゴリーの第1戦が開催。国内トップチームが集結し、都市型野球の迫力ある試合展開が期待される
items.summary_en: The first tournament of Romania's National Baseball5 Championship for Seniors and U18 categories takes place on March 7, 2026 at the Sala Sporturilor in Roman. Top teams from across the country will face off in both senior and junior categories, promising an intense sporting spectacle full of energy.
items.title_ja: Baseball5全国選手権シニア・U18第1戦、Romanで開催
items.title_en: National Baseball5 Championship – Seniors & U18 – Tournament 1 – 2026

items.title: Team Israel 2026 WBC | Media & Press Archive
items.summary_ja: Team Israelは2026 WBCで2勝、歴史的完封勝利を記録し、2030年大会自動出場権を獲得。最激戦ブラケットで.500を達成し、エリート投手陣と新鋭の勝負強さで「シンデレラ」から「強豪」へと評価を高めた
items.summary_en: Team Israel's 2026 World Baseball Classic campaign featured two wins, a historic shutout, and automatic 2030 qualification. Finishing .500 in the tournament's toughest bracket, the team was defined by elite pitching and clutch hitting from emerging prospects. The world's media covered the transformation from Cinderella story to established powerhouse.
items.title_ja: Team Israel、2026 WBCで2勝・歴史的完封・2030年自動出場権獲得
items.title_en: Team Israel 2026 WBC | Media & Press Archive

items.title: Gelof leads Israel past Netherlands in 6-2 victory to end WBC on a high note
items.summary_ja: 三塁手Jake GelofがTeam Israelを6-2勝利に導き、WBC最終戦でNetherlandsを撃破。6回2死満塁でGelofの左方向ゴロが内野を抜けて勝ち越し、Israelは2勝2敗で大会を締めくくった
items.summary_en: Third baseman Jake Gelof was the hero for Team Israel in its final 2026 World Baseball Classic contest on March 10, a 6-2 win over the Netherlands. With the game tied 2-2 and bases loaded in the sixth, Gelof's grounder snuck through the left-infield gap to give Israel a 4-2 lead. Israel finished 2-2.
items.title_ja: Gelofの活躍でIsrael、Netherlandsに6-2勝利しWBC終幕
items.title_en: Gelof leads Israel past Netherlands in 6-2 victory to end WBC on a high note

items.title: L’dor V’dor: Harrison Bader carries the legacy of an Israel Baseball legend
items.summary_ja: 初代Israel Baseball LeagueからWBCまで、Eladio Rodriguezの教えは今も中堅手Harrison Baderを通じて響き続ける。L'dor V'dor（世代から世代へ）の精神がIsrael野球の歴史を繋いでいる
items.summary_en: From the inaugural Israel Baseball League to the World Baseball Classic, the lessons of coach Eladio Rodriguez continue to echo through center fielder Harrison Bader, whom he helped shape. The L'dor V'dor (generation to generation) narrative highlights how Israeli baseball's foundational figures still influence today's top talent on the international stage.
items.title_ja: Harrison Bader、Israel野球の伝説Eladio Rodriguezの遺志を受け継ぐ
items.title_en: L'dor V'dor: Harrison Bader carries the legacy of an Israel Baseball legend

items.title: Belgian NT to BB5 European Championship  7-11 NOV 2023
items.summary_ja: 2023年11月7-11日、LithuaniaのDruskininkaiで開催されるBaseball5欧州選手権に13チームが参加。ベルギー代表はGroup BでLithuania、Italy、Czechia、Estoniaらと対戦する
items.summary_en: Thirteen teams competed for the Baseball5 European Championship 2023 title in Druskininkai, Lithuania from November 7-11, 2023. Teams were split into two groups: Group A included France, Netherlands, Romania, Bulgaria, Latvia, Finland and Spain; Group B featured Lithuania, Italy, Czechia, Belgium, Estonia and others for five days of intense action.
items.title_ja: ベルギー代表、Baseball5欧州選手権2023に出場（11月7-11日）
items.title_en: Belgian NT to BB5 European Championship 7-11 NOV 2023

items.title: Royal Greys Grizzlies at Men’s European Softball Masters Cup 2023 this week
items.summary_ja: 2023年10月25-28日、Barcelonaで第4回Softball European Masters Cupが開催。40歳以上の選手を対象とした大会で、男子部門には8チームが参加する
items.summary_en: The fourth edition of the Softball European Masters Cups takes place in Barcelona from October 25-28, 2023. Established in 2019 for players over 40 years old, the Men's Masters Cup brings together eight teams including Denmark Old Stars, Goya Team Rivas, Gubbs, and Belgium's Royal Greys Grizzlies competing across multiple days.
items.title_ja: Royal Greys Grizzlies、Men's European Softball Masters Cup 2023出場
items.title_en: Royal Greys Grizzlies at Men's European Softball Masters Cup 2023 this week

items.title: Update Belgian Series Baseball – Spartans take the lead and can become Belgian Champions this weekend
items.summary_ja: 2023年Belgian Series BaseballはHoboken PioneersとRoyal Deurne Spartansの対戦。ベスト5シリーズでSpartansが第1戦9-3、第2戦6-5で連勝し、今週末にも優勝決定の可能性がある
items.summary_en: The 2023 Belgian Series Baseball final pits defending champion Hoboken Pioneers against Royal Deurne Spartans in a best-of-5 series. Spartans took a commanding 2-0 lead by winning the first two games 9-3 and 6-5, and could clinch the Belgian championship this weekend. Beveren Lions recently captured the Belgian Softball Ladies title.
items.title_ja: Belgian Series Baseball：Deurne Spartansが王手、優勝に迫る
items.title_en: Update Belgian Series Baseball – Spartans take the lead and can become Belgian Champions this weekend

items.title: WBSC Europe Introduces Parallel Playing System for 2026 Season
items.summary_ja: WBSC Europeは2026年シーズンのパイロット事業としてParallel Playing制度を導入。選手が所定条件下で異なる国内連盟所属の2クラブに参加可能となり、欧州各地での競技・育成機会を広げる
items.summary_en: WBSC Europe has launched the Parallel Playing system as a pilot initiative for the 2026 season, offering athletes new opportunities to compete, develop and gain international experience across Europe. The system allows an athlete to participate for two clubs affiliated with different National Federations under clearly defined conditions and with approval from all involved parties.
items.title_ja: WBSC Europe、2026年シーズンにParallel Playing制度を導入
items.title_en: WBSC Europe Introduces Parallel Playing System for 2026 Season

items.title: Watch the informational sessions on the transition to WBSC Baseball Rules
items.summary_ja: MLB BaseballルールからWBSC Baseballルールへの移行に関するオンライン説明会2回分の録画が公開。附録を含む主要な変更点を解説しており、3月31日と別日の2セッションを視聴可能
items.summary_en: Two online information sessions on the transition from MLB Baseball Rules to WBSC Baseball Rules, including the accompanying addendum, were recently held by the Royal Belgian Baseball and Softball Federation. Participants received a clear overview of the most important changes. Recordings from both meetings (March 31, 2026 and another date) are available to watch online.
items.title_ja: MLBルールからWBSC野球ルールへの移行、説明会録画公開
items.title_en: Watch the informational sessions on the transition to WBSC Baseball Rules

items.title: Saturday, April 4th Opening Day Competitions 2026
items.summary_ja: ベルギー2026年野球・ソフトボールシーズンは4月4日開幕。13部門で計102のシニアチームと53のユースチームが全国で競技し、野球106・ソフトボール49チームと過去最多の参加数となった
items.summary_en: The 2026 Belgian Baseball and Softball league season opens Saturday, April 4th with more teams than ever before: 102 senior and 53 youth teams compete nationally across 13 Divisions. Of these, 106 are baseball teams and 49 are fastpitch/slowpitch softball teams, not including numerous recreational teams organizing their own club competitions.
items.title_ja: ベルギー2026年シーズン、4月4日に過去最多のチーム数で開幕
items.title_en: Saturday, April 4th Opening Day Competitions 2026

items.title: Baseball Will Tell You Where It Needs To Grow
items.summary_ja: WBCで多くの選手・コーチが野球普及への願いを語った。Italyのように野球が地域限定で存在し、アメリカ出身選手に頼る国では、Royals所属のVinnie Pasquantinoら選手の発信が競技拡大の起爆剤となる可能性がある
items.summary_en: During the World Baseball Classic, many players and coaches shared their wish to grow the game globally. Italy, whose baseball exists in pockets and relies on American bloodlines for its national team, drew special attention. Kansas City Royals first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino, Italy's most recognizable WBC name, spoke to reporters about baseball's growth potential during pool play.

items.title: Takeaways from Italy’s 8-6 World Baseball Classic Quarterfinal Victory over Puerto Rico
items.summary_ja: Italy代表がWBC準々決勝でPuerto Ricoを8-6で破り、準決勝進出を果たした。主将Vinnie Pasquantinoは「Italyで試合が放映され、新聞1面に載った。それこそがWBCの存在意義」と大会の意義を語った
items.summary_en: Team Italy's Cinderella run to the World Baseball Classic semifinals after an 8-6 quarterfinal victory over Puerto Rico shows the tournament's value. Captain Vinnie Pasquantino said Italy being able to watch the game on television and appearing on front pages of newspapers is what the WBC is about, highlighting the tournament's role in growing baseball globally.

items.title: Takeaways from Team USA’s 5-3 World Baseball Classic Quarterfinal Victory over Canada
items.summary_ja: Team USAはWBC準々決勝でライバルCanadaを5-3で撃破。プール戦の爆発力は影を潜めたが、Aaron Judgeが初回に二塁打を放ち、救援陣がクラッチな投球で3-0のリードを守りきった
items.summary_en: Clutch relievers carried Team USA to a 5-3 quarterfinal win over rival Canada in the World Baseball Classic. Far from the explosiveness shown in pool play, USA grabbed an early 3-0 lead relatively quietly. Aaron Judge, dubbed Captain America, doubled in the first inning to energize the Houston crowd, though the first run came off a groundout.
